topic: How to pick the right business category on Google Maps
caption:
Your Google Business category is not a formality.
Pick the most specific primary category that matches what you actually do.
A wrong choice buries you. A right one puts you in front of ready buyers.
We build sites that back up your Google presence when they click. Link in bio.

#LocalSEO #HighDesert #Victorville #Hesperia #AppleValley #SmallBusiness #SmallBusinessOwner #WebDesign #WebsiteDesign #VeteranOwned #GoogleMaps #GoogleBusinessProfile
alt_text: A close-up of a Google Maps business listing on a phone screen showing the category selection field for a small business profile.

copy.headline: Your Google Category Is Costing You Customers
copy.body: Choosing the wrong primary category on Google Maps means you show up for the wrong searches. Be specific. 'HVAC Contractor' beats 'Contractor' every time.
copy.caption:
Your Google Business category is not a formality.

A wrong choice buries you. A right one puts you in front of ready buyers.
We build sites that back up your Google presence when they click. Link in bio.
